# Release Notes Template

Use this template when creating a new release. Copy the relevant section from `CHANGELOG.md`.

## What's Changed

### New Features
- List new features here

### Improvements
- List improvements and enhancements here

### Bug Fixes
- List bug fixes here

### Technical Changes
- List technical/internal changes here

## Installation

Download `LFRaider.zip` and extract to your `World of Warcraft/_anniversary_/Interface/AddOns/` directory.

## Usage

Type `/lfr` to look up your target, or `/lfr help` for commands.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/voc0der/LFRaider/compare/vX.X.X...vX.X.X
